subject: [PATCH v2 18/28] nfsd: add tracepoint to dir_event handler

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a tracepoint to the dir_event handler in the NFS server (nfsd) code. The purpose of this change is to provide additional visibility into how fsnotify handlers are being called. This can be useful for debugging and understanding the behavior of the nfsd code. Specifically, the new tracepoint will log information about directory events, including the mask of events triggered, the inode number of the affected directory, and the name of the file or subdirectory involved. The patch also includes a new event class declaration in the trace.h header file to support this new tracepoint.
